steps.title: Use identical lines
steps.content: A system has infinitely many solutions only when the two equations represent the same line.

steps.title: Match the intercept
steps.content:
The given equation is
$$
y=\frac{2}{7}x+3
$$
For $y=mx+b$ to be identical, the $y$-intercept must be $3$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the given line and choose the equation with the same intercept. The answer is D.
